nodes.label: AI as information retrieval and summarization tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or context-blind code generator

nodes.label: AI as automation for repetitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as requiring more effort than manual work

nodes.label: Personal investment in task
nodes.grounding_span: less likely to use AI the more personally invested I am in the task

nodes.label: AI as source of serendipitous learning
nodes.label_negative: AI as providing generic or unhelpful code
nodes.grounding_span: it may mention something off-handedly in the response, maybe mention an algorithm, or technique I was not aware of

nodes.label: AI autonomy and non-intrusiveness
nodes.grounding_span: I do not like the AI suggesting what I do next

nodes.label: Learning and intellectual growth
nodes.grounding_span: I always like to be learning new things

nodes.label: Autonomy and personal control
nodes.grounding_span: I have a pretty clear idea what I want by the time I even open the chat

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for information retrieval and learning
nodes.grounding_span: when I learn about a new technique to solve the problem I am working on, that is very rewarding

nodes.label: Frustration with AI code generation
nodes.grounding_span: the code returned is generally correct, but much too generalized, and requires more effort to integrate it than to write the code myself

nodes.label: Concern about job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: If the AI improves to the level where it can just wholesale output robust, working code, then I guess I'm out of work

nodes.label: Pragmatic openness to future AI use
nodes.grounding_span: If it improves in an area where before it fell short, I will start using it in that new area

nodes.label: Rejection of AI with unsolicited suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: I no longer use that model

nodes.label: Task-specific, non-iterative interaction pattern
nodes.grounding_span: I ask for a specific thing, then later ask for another specific thing

nodes.label: Pragmatic capability testing and adaptation
nodes.grounding_span: I will occasionally just have a play with the AI, and test it's capabilities
